ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "is_mobile" INTEGER /* Whether the user is accessing the website on a mobile device */,
  "is_returning_visitor" INTEGER /* Whether the user is a returning visitor */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device the user is using (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location for geotargeting */,
  "user_segment" TEXT /* Segment the user belongs to for targeted marketing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "visit_duration" REAL /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "time_of_day" INTEGER /* Time of day (1-24 hours) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "page_views" INTEGER /* Number of pages viewed during the session */,
  "search_terms" TEXT /* Search terms used by the user during the session */,
  "bounced" INTEGER /* Whether the session was a bounce */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for more detailed device and browser information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session associated with the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, purchase) */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the action (if applicable) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact time of the action */,
  "action_value" REAL /* Value associated with the action (e.g., purchase amount) */,
  "referrer" TEXT /* Referrer URL for the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action (e.g., search query, product attributes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the product */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)
column_names: Whether the user is accessing the website on a mobile device
Whether the user is a returning visitor
Date and time when the user registered
Date and time of the user's last login
Type of device the user is using (e.g., mobile, desktop)
